error_signature: sub-workflow does not return an output
title: Sub-workflow not returning output to main workflow
symptom: The sub-workflow shows output in its last node but does not return any value to the main workflow, resulting in a blank response.
not_this_if: The main workflow is not configured to receive data
root_cause: The issue arises from the logical flow within the sub-workflow. If certain conditions are met, such as a siteId existing in the database, the workflow may not execute the intended path that returns data, leading to a blank response.
fix_steps: Modify the sub-workflow to use a Get operation to retrieve data from the data table.
Add an IF node to check if the data exists before proceeding.
Ensure the Get node is set to always output data, even if no data is found.
agent_instruction: Adjust the sub-workflow logic to ensure it correctly returns data to the main workflow.
